case_title: HUNG TANG VS. ELEUTERIO T. CATACUTAN

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO OCT-28-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-16-2008 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY TANG, HUNG AS TO DEFENDANT CATACUTAN, ELEUTERIO T. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-28-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TANG, HUNG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CATACUTAN, ELEUTERIO T. $800.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $925.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CATACUTAN, ELEUTERIO T.
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE OF THE DEFENDANT, (VIA MAIL) REQUEST FOR RESET. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TANG, HUNG
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK P. SCHREIBER FILED BY TANG, HUNG CATACUTAN, ELEUTERIO T.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-30-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CATACUTAN, ELEUTERIO T.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-28-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-28-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK P. SCHREIBER. BOTH SIDES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REORTED. (506).
